sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Character Selection
special_mechanics.description: Up to 20 recruitable warriors, each with different weapons. Players control one character at a time with varying abilities

special_mechanics.name: Escort Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Captive characters can be rescued by walking over them, then must be escorted to the exit point. Rescued characters become part of active party

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but no technical physics parameters. Game mechanics are action-based similar to Gauntlet/Berzerk but specific movement values, gravity, jump physics, and sub-pixel systems are not documented in available sources.
